# Guide lines

## Tokens Goals
- conserve tokens by using short words and sentences
- avoid unnecessary explanations and details

## Response and Plan Guidelines

- be preceise only list high level plan and points
- keep explanasions short to the point only. e.g., instead of saying "so I can fetch the details of the parametes from api" say "fetching parameters form api"
- prefer short words and sentences, avoid using complex words and long sentences
- Use shortwords and abbreviations when possible, e.g., "fetching" can be "fetch", "parameters" can be "params", etc.
- explain only all the necessary details to understand the plan, avoid unnecessary details and explanations for in between steps and thinking process, e.g., instead of saying "I will first check if the user is authenticated, then I will check if the user has the required permissions, and finally I will fetch the data from the database" say "check auth, check permissions, fetch data from db"
